'''Sea Sprite 1''' was a [[C-3 passenger liner]] that carried tourists to and from various locations across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was present at the [[Destreg Spaceport]] near [[Destreg II]] when [[Emon Azzameen|Emon]] and [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] attempted to assassinate [[K'Armyn Viraxo]] by destroying his personal [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]], the ''[[Highroller]]''. Sea Sprite 1 was not harmed in the battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
